folio.label: 109r
folio.l: But that ©e ben , so ful of sapience
That ©ow ne lyketú , for ©oure heygú prudence
To wyue fro the word , of Salamouö
This word seide he , vn to vs euäychou~
Werk al thyngö be counseil , thus seide he
And tha~ne shalt æè nat , repente the
But thougú that Salamon , spak swicú a word
Myn owen dere brother , and my lord
So wysly god my soule , brynge at rest
I holde ©oure owen counseil , is the best
For brother myn , of me take this motyf
I haue now ben , a courte man al my lyf
And god it wot , thougú I vnworthy be
I haue stonden , in ful gret degree
A boue lordes , of ful heigú astate
ñet had I neuäe , witú noonö of hem debate
I neuäe hem contraried , trewely
I wot wel that my lord , can more than I
What that he seitú , I holde it ferme and stable
I seye the same , or ellis thyngö semblable
A ful gret fool , is ony counseillour
That seruetú any lord , of heigú honour
That dar presume , or ellis thynken it
That his counseil , shulde passe his lordes wyt
Nay , lordes be none fooles be my fay
ñe han ©oure self , seid heere to day
So heigú sentence , so holily and so wele
That I consente , and conferme euäydele
ñoure wordes alle , and ©oure opynyou~
By god there nys man , in al this toun~
Ne in Ytaille , coude bet haue I seyd
Crist halt hym , of this counseille ful wel paid
And trewely it is , an heigú corage
Of ony man , that stopen is in age
To take a ©ongö wyf , be my fader kyn
ñoure hert hangetú , oon a Ioly pyn
Dotú now in this matere , rigút as ©ow lyst
For Fynally , I holde it for the best
¢ Iustinus that ay stille sat , and herde

note.notetxt: Is there a correction here? Check the beginning of line 275/ODR/

folio.l: Rygút in this wyse , he to Placebo answerde
Now brother myn , be pacient I pray
Syn ©e han seid , and herkene what I sey
Senek , a mongis hise othere wordes xxxx wyse
Seitú , that a man , ougút hi~ rigút xxxxx wel avyse
To whom he ©eueth his lond , or his xxxxx catel
